def positive_repeated_normalization_of_same_string_in_loop():
    rule_id = "repeated_normalization_of_same_string_in_loop"
    family = "hot_path"
    severity = "info"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Flag repeated .strip(), .lower(), .casefold(), or similar normalization on the same value inside a loop."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
